chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 4125 of 2020 CP D 4126 of 2020 CP D 4127 of 2020 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ For orders as to maintainability of petition 10.03.2025 Mr. Muhammad Ishaque, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Tahir Khalil advocate holds brief for Mr. Muhammad Khalil Dogar, advocate for respondent Mr. Muhammad Bilal Bhatti, advocate for respondent Mr. Kashif Nazir, Assistant Attorney General In these petitions the case is that the petitioner claims refund of Regulatory Duty. Respective applications have been preferred before the competent authority and the petitioner seeks that the same may be decided after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner. Learned counsel for respondents articulates no cavil in such regard and states that these petitions may be disposed off in the above terms. Order accordingly. Office is instructed to place copy of this order in connected matters. Judge Judge Amjad
